case_title: PARSA DEVELOPMENT, INC., A CA. CORP. VS. FREESAMPLES.COM, A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE UP ON CALENDAR IN SCD 218 AT 9:00 A.M. ON JUNE 25, 2002. HEARING SET FOR JUN-25-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2002, DEFAULT PROVE UP ON CALENDAR IN SCD 218 AT 9:00 A.M. ON JUNE 25, 2002. GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER OF COMM. LORETTA M. NORRIS, W/ DEBORAH NEVILLE, CSR, AND FRANK M. HENTON, CT. CLERK.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARSA DEVELOPMENT, INC., A CA. CORP.
